Happy Client

Garments Division

Knit plus Limited Garments Division is basically a garment division. Here there are some other sections including sewing, cutting, quality, finishing. Knit plus Limited Unit 01 is the first unit from where the journey of Knit plus Limited started.

Kniting, Deying, AOP, Sweater & Accessories Division

Knit Plus Limited Kniting, Deying, AOP, Sweater & Accessories Division is an eco-friendly dyeing, knitting factory. There are more sections like all over prints, sweaters, Schiffli embroidery, ETP etc. Here all activities are performed with full security.

printing & Embroidery Division

Knit Plus Limited Printing & Embroidery Division has been doing quality screen printing and embroidery work with utmost reliability. There are quality screen prints, embroidery and eco-friendly ETP.

Business

Since 2003

PLOT NO. : 2036, MOUCHAK, KALIAKOIR, GAZIPUR.

ABOUT US

We have a strong infrastructure setup comprising of the entire range of facilities with resources. A fashionable manufacturing unit equipped with latest hi-tech machineries.
